title: cynosurus cristatus f. tenuis
intro: Cynosurus cristatus f. tenuis, also known as slender dog's-tail grass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and relieving pain, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Cynosurus cristatus f. tenuis is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be dried and made into capsules or powders for easier consumption.
